rationale: In the citing paper, Chung and Rao (2003) appears only in grouped citations to prior marketing work on reservation-price measurement and as an example of an indirect choice-based approach. The citing authors do not engage that paper's bundle model, assumptions, or empirical results in any detailed way, and they do not build their ICERANGE procedure directly from it. The citation functions as broad background positioning rather than a distinct conceptual or methodological dependency.
